snippet.title: Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
'Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral'

Prince William and his brother, Prince Harry, were seen walking together through the grounds of Windsor Castle following the funeral of their grandfather, Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh, on Saturday.

snippet.title: POLKAHOLIKI - LJUBLJENA (Official Video)
snippet.description:
SI: POLKAHOLIKI so za vsa dekleta in žene posneli romantično pesem, odo ženskam in dekletom. Lepo je ljubiti in vsako jutro pogledat v LJUBLJENE oči, ki žarijo od sreče. Polkaholiki verjamejo, da lahko dekle. ki jo ljubiš večno, spoznaš tudi v zelo mladih letih. 

HR: POLKAHOLIKI su snimili najromantičniju pjesmu do sada koja je oda svim ženama. Pjesma se zove VOLJENA. Lijepo je voljeti i svako jutro gledati u voljene oči koje sijaju od sreće. Polkaholiki vjeruju da curu koju ćeš voljeti zauvijek, možeš upoznati dok si mlad.

Music: Raay Lyrics: Maja Kvertkov
Produced by: RAAY MUSIC, 2021
Video by: NEO VISUALS, 2021 
Executive producer: Raay 

ZAHVALE: Iskrena hvala za sodelovanje krajinskemu parku Sečoveljske soline za prekrasno lokacijo./ Iskreno hvala za sudjelovanje PARKU PRIRODE SEČOVLJANSKE SOLANE za predivnu lokaciju. 

HVALA:  Poročni salon HOLLYWOOD - Franjo Oset & Kontrabas Forte - Mesarija FinGušt

Matic, Žiga, Rene in Gašper! Vaši POLKAHOLIKI! 

FOLLOW POLKAHOLIKI INSTAGRAM: @polkaholiki
E-mail: polkaholiki@gmail.com 
GSM kontakt / management: +386 31 568 405 
FB: https://www.facebook.com/polkaholiki/

Pretplati se na JoomBoos, stisni zvonce i ne propusti niti jedan video: http://bit.ly/joomboos_subscribe

✔Znaš li da imamo i TikTok? Zaprati nas: https://vm.tiktok.com/Xs7PCb/
Čekiraj naš web i zabavi se uz mnoštvo kvizova, savjeta i novosti iz YouTube svijeta: https://joomboos.hr/

 I ovdje smo: INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/joomboosyt/

snippet.title: Ula spregovorila o svojem prvem spolnem odnosu 😉❤️ | MOJ PRVIČ | Nika Zorjan in Ula Ložar
snippet.description:
Te zanima kako je PRVIČ izgledalo pri Uli in Niki? Tokrat sta delili nekaj ZELO osebnih stvari, med njimi tudi prvi SPOLNI ODNOS in prvo izkušnjo z ALKOHOLOM! 😱🤯 O čem naj govorita naslednjič?  🤭👇

INSTAGRAM: 
Joonglaa: https://www.instagram.com/joonglaa/
Nika Zorjan: https://www.instagram.com/nikazorjan/
Ula Ložar: https://www.instagram.com/lozar_ula/
TIKTOK:
Joonglaa: https://www.tiktok.com/@joonglaa?lang=en
Nika Zorjan: https://www.tiktok.com/@nikazorjanofficial?lang=en
Ula Ložar: https://www.tiktok.com/@lozar_ula?lang=en


To je Joonglaa! Zabavni YouTube kanal, na katerem zmagovalka Joonglaa Star šova - Kaya Solo,  Nika Zorjan, BQL, Polkaholiki, Poskočni Dejan, Alya, Ula Ložar in mnogi drugi objavljajo video posnetke. Obljubimo, da se boste zabavali in nasmejali. Naročite se in nas spremljajte!

#TonciHuljic #Inamorana #PetarGraso #MadreBadessa

Inamorana,
uvik je dobro vrime
nekom svome doć...
Inamorana,
ja srce svoje po tvon
štiman dan i noć...
Inamorana,
profumi mažurana
prolaze kraj nas...
Inamorana,
kad judi vole
šutnja najjači je glas...

Di bi ti, di bi ti,
tu bi ja...
Di si ti, di si ti,
tu san ja...
Da  proveden tri života
sa tobon u četri oka,
malo bi, malo bi bilo...
Malo bi, malo bi bilo...
Da ti stoput kažen fala
za sve ono šta si dala,
malo bi, malo bi bilo...

inamorana – zaljubljena
profumi - mirisi

snippet.title: The Truth About my Son
snippet.description:
Now that you've met my son, please consider sharing and donating to impact his life and so many others like him.
Livestream link (April 30th- MARK YOUR CALENDAR NOW!)- https://youtu.be/5J3peD8LZ5o
Learn more about the charity NEXT for Autism here- https://www.nextforautism.org/current-events/color-the-spectrum/

Join us in the live stream with a few folks you mighta heard of such as:
Andy Samberg, Adam Sandler, Casey Neistat, Chris Rock, Conan o'brien, Miranda Sings, iJustine, Jack Black, Jacksepticeye, John Oliver, Jon Stewart, Karl Jacobs, Marques Brownlee, Maya Rudolph, Mark Hamill, Merrell Twins, MrBeast, Paul Rudd, Rhett & Link, Sarah Silverman, Stephen Colbert, Terry Crews, Vsauce, Zach Galifianakis, Zach King plus a few more surprises!

snippet.title: BAKAPRASE - OBI (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/bakaprase/​
ŠAIM SE. brend USKORO: https://saimse.com/​
SPOTIFY: uskoro...
DEEZER: uskoro...

Tekst: @BakaPrase 
Muzika: BakaPrase
Aranžman: @jonezr9 @bogi_batina
mix/master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @nedeljkovicvuk - Debbug
Directed by: BakaPrase, Debbug
Video Edit & Post Production: Debbug - @nedeljkovicvuk

Hvala horu "Čarolija" što su otpevali najllepše na svetu.

Artwork: Djoxa Designs - @_djoxa_

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


i kada stanem u zutu lokvu poludim
posle hrane je svuda sranje po kuci

krevet zapisan govna pun je stan
mali je al sere kilogram

napolju me blam dok govna sakupljam
zapitam se dal je normalan

ooo govna blato gazi sve
ooo pa onda sapom mazi me
ooo ooo
pa batinice
novina puca jako

trcimo po snegu
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


ref x 2
bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan

snippet.title: Polo G - RAPSTAR (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Official video for "RAPSTAR" by Polo G

Listen + Download "RAPSTAR" out now: https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR

Amazon Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/amazonmusic
Apple Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/applemusic
Audiomack - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/audiomack
Deezer - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/deezer
iTunes - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/itunes
Soundcloud - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/soundcloud
Spotify - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/spotify
YouTube Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/youtubemusic

Lyrics

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished

I won’t love a hoe after we fuck she can’t get near me
Only bitch I give a conversation to is Siri
My pants Amiri
Yes I’m winning clearly
I’m the chosen one see my potential so they fear me
Lately I’ve been praying God I wonder can you hear me
Thinking about the old me I swear I miss you dearly
Stay down until you come up I’ve been sticking to that theory
Every day a battle I’m exhausted and I’m weary
Make sure I smile in public when alone my eyes teary
I fought through it all but that shit hurt me severely 
I’ve been getting high to hide behind my insecurities
Taking different pills but I know it ain’t no 

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished

They say I’m Pac rebirth
Never put out a weak verse
Homicides when we lurk
Imma step ‘til my feet hurt
Been putting them streets first
White tee turned burgundy tee shirts
Looking for something real, he stuck in a deep search
Anxiety killing me I just wanna leave Earth
When they ask if I’m okay it just make everything seem worse
Trying to explain your feelings sound like something you rehearse 
Stab me in my back with a clean smirk

Looking so deep into your eyes I can read your thoughts
Shut the fuck- I mean please don’t talk
I’ve done been through too much and I don’t need another loss
Put that on every war scar for every battle that I’ve fought

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished
When I’m finished, when I’m finished

Directed by Arrad
Written & Co-directed by Polo G
Produced by Riveting Entertainment

Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/polo.capalot/
Tiktok - https://www.tiktok.com/@pologofficial
Twitter - https://twitter.com/Polo_Capalot

I can't believe we were locked in an art store for 50 hours
Instant Influencer Announcement On @ZHC Crafts 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nQx2jYrsVDc

Subscribe right now and you might get picked to win cash, custom apple products, custom cars, and even custom houses!

New merch coming soon: https://zhcstore.com/

If this video gets 1,000,000 likes we'll give away a house


Follow my socials! 
Instagram - @ zhc
Twitter - @ zhc_yt


To apply to be on “Instant Influencer with ZHC,” submit your self-taped YouTube video in our casting portal here.
Tag your videos under the hashtag castmeZHC on YouTube to show the world you've got what it takes.
Uploaders must ensure their videos comply with the YouTube Terms of Service and Community Guidelines.
Uploaders must be over the age of 18 and must live in the United States. Sorry I wasn't able to make it international this time.
Uploaders must have at least 6 uploads in the last 3 months on their YouTube channel.
Uploaders that demonstrate strong expertise in the art space and a passion for educating and inspiring others will be considered for participation in the show.

snippet.title: IFSC Boulder World Cup Meiringen 2021 || Men's and women's finals
snippet.description:
Boulder is back! The first IFSC Boulder World Cup in almost two years will take place at the Haslital Climbing Center in Meiringen, Switzerland, from 16 to 17 April 2021. Almost 200 athletes will compete in the inaugural competition of the Olympic season.

Website: ifsc-climbing.org
Facebook: @sportclimbing
Instagram: @ifsclimbing
Twitter: @ifsclimbing

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St George’s Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.title: First Flight of the Ingenuity Mars Helicopter: Live from Mission Control
snippet.description: Up, up, and away! The Ingenuity #MarsHelicopter is set to make history. It will make the first attempt at powered flight on another planet on Monday, April 19. Don’t miss your chance to watch live with helicopter team in mission control beginning at 6:15 a.m. EDT (10:15 a.m. UTC) as they receive the data and find out if they were successful.

snippet.title: First Video of NASA’s Ingenuity Mars Helicopter in Flight, Includes Takeoff and Landing (High-Res)
snippet.description:
In this video captured by NASA’s Perseverance rover, the agency's Ingenuity Mars Helicopter took the first powered, controlled flight on another planet on April 19, 2021. 

The rover was parked at “Van Zyl Overlook,” about 211 feet (64.3 meters) away in Mars' Jezero Crater and chronicled the flight operations with its cameras.

These images from the rover’s Mastcam-Z cameras show the helicopter hovering above the Red Planet's surface. During this first flight, the helicopter climbed to an altitude of 10 feet (3 meters), hovered, and then touched back down on the surface of Mars.
 
Ingenuity is a technology demonstration. The 4-pound (1.8-kilogram) rotorcraft will help determine whether future explorations on Mars could include an aerial perspective.

Perseverance touched down at "Octavia E. Butler Landing" with Ingenuity attached to its belly on Feb. 18, 2021. The helicopter was deployed to the surface on April 3.

For more information on Ingenuity, visit : https://mars.nasa.gov/technology/helicopter/.

For more information on Perseverance, visit: https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance.

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech/ASU/MSSS

snippet.title: Luka Doncic drains a 3-pointer buzzer-beater vs. Grizzlies and Joel Embiid drops 39 against the Nets
snippet.description:
Luka Doncic drains a 3-pointer buzzer-beater vs. Grizzlies and Joel Embiid drops 39 against the Nets
0:00 SportsNation kicks off the NBA action with Luka Doncic’s amazing game-winning buzzer-beater and how the NBA world reacted to it. 
1:45 The Philadelphia 76ers beat an under-manned Brooklyn Nets team with Joel Embiid putting up another MVP-level performance. 
3:30 Around the Association: The Milwaukee Bucks won big against the Minnesota Timberwolves, Reggie Jackson hit the game-winner for the LA Clippers, and Steph Curry tries to check back into a game after scoring 42 points. 
6:00 Ros Gold0-Onwude joins SportsNation to talk about the NBA’s tight schedule and how that is impacting the health of the league’s star players.
#NBA #SportsNation

snippet.title: Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall Arrive For Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall were among the members of the Royal Family to arrive at Windsor Castle on Saturday ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

#KateMiddleton #PrincessBeatrice #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Manchester City and Chelsea set to withdraw from the European Super League
snippet.description:
► Subscribe to Sky Sports News: http://bit.ly/SkySportsNewsSub

Manchester City have told organisers that they do not wish to be part of the Super League.

City join Chelsea as the second of the six English member clubs to choose to withdraw following a hugely negative global reaction to the planned competition.

Manchester United, Liverpool, Tottenham and Arsenal are the remaining four English clubs tied to the competition. 

#SkySportsNews #SkySports #EuropeanSuperLeague

snippet.title: NIKA ZORJAN - ZATE DOVOLJ (Official Video)
snippet.description:
HR:
Nika Zorjan donosi van novu pjesmu ZATE DOVOLJ (Za tebe dovoljna). Priča puna emocija i poruke o bezuvjettnoj ljubavi, neće vas ostaviti hladninma. Pravu filmsku glazbenu priču odglumili su ROBERT KOROŠEC, glavni glumac trenutno #1 hit serije Najini mostovi na slovenskoj POP TV i mlada LANAI. U  životu najviše znači kada si nekome dovoljan zbog toga što si i kakav jesi.

SI:
NIKA ZORJAN nam predstavlja novo pesem ZATE DOVOLJ. Biti ljubljen zato ker si in tak kot si je najlepši občutek na svetu. Z ganljivim videospotom, polnim emocij, sta filmsko glasbeno zgodbo  odigrala ROBERT KOROŠEC, glavni igralec serije Najini mostovi na Pop Tv in mlada LANAI, ki bosta pričarala čarovnijo, ki jo opisuje skladba.

TEKST / LYRICS: 

VEM, NISEM VSAK DAN
DOBRA DRUŽBA,
VČASIH ZMANJKA MI BESED,
VČASIH ZMANJKA MI BESED.

LE TI, TI ME VIDIŠ V SRCE
IN STOPIŠ ME KAKOR LED
IN STOPIŠ ME KAKOR LED.

VEDNO SEM ZATE DOVOLJ,
V MENI VIDIŠ LE LEPÓ.
IN TI, TI ME NASMEJEŠ, ME OGREJEŠ,
KO ME POGLEDAŠ, TAKO JE TOPLÓ.

IN ZAME SI TU,
KAKOR SO ZVEZDE NA NEBU.
IN NI, NI LEPŠEGA, KO VEM, DA LAHKO
ZASPIVA V OBJEMU.

OB TEBI SE NIKOLI NE PRETVARJAM,
TI V PIKO ME POZNAŠ
IN KAR RABIM, TO MI DAŠ.

snippet.title: Audi RS6 generations DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Check this out, RS6 fans - we’ve brought in every generation of the RS6 and they're going head-to-head in an almighty drag race! From the 450hp C5 through to the current 600hp C8, we’re here to find out just how these four generations of RS6 perform over the quarter-mile. 

As you’d expect, Mat’s in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, we’ve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although it’s also slightly down on torque (750Nm). 

The C6 may be several years older, but when you consider it’s powered by a 5-litre twin-turbo V10, it’s surely got to be in with a shout, right? Or perhaps the C5, with its 4.2-litre twin-turbo V8, could spring a surprise? 

All we know is, there’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.title: Shakedown LIVE - WRC Croatia Rally 2021
snippet.description:
Don´t miss WRC round 3 LIVE on wrcplus.com 22 - 25 April 🇭🇷 

More FREE videos, news and results at https://www.wrc.com

Watch LIVE rally! All stages of every rally live or on demand with live cameras on stage, onboard and in the air, including expert analysis, behind the scenes stories, split times and real time GPS tracking. Thousands of onboard videos with moving maps, speed, gear, pedal and steering data, rally highlights, and exclusive videos all available on demand anytime, on any device with your subscription to WRC+ All Live.
http://www.wrcplus.com/

Find out about the official WRC video game on PC, XBox, Playstation and Nintendo Consoles here.
https://www.wrcthegame.com

eSports WRC Championship, is open to anyone, driving on the same roads and stages as the real-life WRC.
https://www.wrc.com/en/more/gaming/esports-wrc/

Rally Fan? Merch, clothing and more at the official shop of the FIA World Rally Championship.
https://shop.wrc.com/

Subscribe to this YouTube Channel for exclusive, frequent new rally videos.
https://www.youtube.com/user/wrc?sub_confirmation=1

Behind the scenes and more on Facebook.
https://www.facebook.com/WorldRally

Videos, photos, stories and competitions to win on Instagram.
https://www.instagram.com/officialwrc/

News, results, photos, videos on Twitter.
https://twitter.com/OfficialWRC

The WRC is the FIA World Rally Championship, a tough motorsport using rally cars on real roads around the world. Watch the best rally drivers battle on gravel and asphalt roads with mud, rain, dust, ice and heat! Watch high speed action as the rally drivers power slide and drift round narrow corners, go flat out over a big jump or through a watersplash, handbrake turn round a hairpin, survive a big moment, or have a massive crash! Rally requires maximum attack and careful tactics to become world rally champion.

Each rally has timed sections called special stages, on closed roads. Drivers complete these stages as quickly as possible. A co-driver reads pace notes that explain the hazards ahead. Rally drivers use the same rally car to travel to each stage on public roads, following normal traffic regulations. The crew which completes all the stages in the shortest time is the rally winner. Championship points are won using the same scoring system as Formula 1. The championship is administered by Fédération Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), motorsport's world governing body.

Over 30 countries have hosted WRC rallies. Rally Monte Carlo, Rally Argentina, Rally Finland, Rally Portugal, Tour de Corse on Corsica, France, Rally Sardegna on Sardinia, Italy, Safari Rally in Kenya, Acropolis Rally in Greece, Rally New Zealand, Rally Australia, Rally Japan, Rally GB, Rally Catalunya, Rallye Deutschland, Rally Mexico and many more.

Some of the world's greatest drivers have won the FIA World Rally Championship for Drivers, like Colin McRae, Carlos Sainz, Walter Röhrl, Stig Blomqvist, Petter Solberg, Ott Tänak. The list of world rally champions includes many Finnish rally drivers like Juha Kankkunen, Tommi Mäkinen, Ari Vatanen, Marcus Grönholm, Hannu Mikkola. French drivers have had success with Sébastien Ogier, and 9 times world champion Sébastien Loeb. Famous drivers from other motorsports have come to try rally driving like Ken Block from Rallycross, and Robert Kubica and Kimi Räikkönen from F1.

Car companies compete for the prestigious FIA World Rally Championship for Manufacturers awarded to the most successful WRC constructor. Winners include Citroen, Hyundai, Volkswagen and Peugeot. Ford have had success with the Ford Escort, Ford Focus and Ford Fiesta when the M-Sport team won in 2017.
The 1980's featured the iconic Group B rally cars like the Lancia 037 and Delta S4, Peugeot 205 T16, MG Metro 6R4, Ford RS200 and Audi Quattro.
Japan dominated the 1990s with the Mitsubishi Lancer, Subaru Impreza, and Toyota Celica and Toyota Corolla. Toyota returned to the WRC in 2017 with the Toyota Yaris WRC, winning in 2018. The 2019 championship was won by Hyundai with the Hyundai i20 Coupe WRC. Find out about the latest winners and champions at https://www.wrc.com

snippet.title: Engine Swapping James’ AE86 - Was it Worth It?
snippet.description:
Install Raid for Free ✅ IOS/ANDROID/PC: https://clcr.me/Apr_DonutMedia and get a special starter pack 💥 Available only for the next 30 days

The AE86 has been a pretty big paper weight for the past couple months and it’s finally time to give it a new heart! James has been doing a ton of research while Zach has been assembling the engine to what will hopefully be a “smooth” engine swap.

Now we’d really like to thank everyone who has helped at pretty much every stage of this Swap!

Note: The guys over at Panic (Mark and Matt) helped us remote tune the 86 and now it feels better than ever!

@panicmade | www.panicmade.com

If you want more behind the scenes, access to exclusive content, and exclusive merch HIT that JOIN button to become a member of the infamous, internet renowned DONUT UNDERGROUND. 

Money Pit is where you get to learn about cars as we work on them. Each ep we’ll breakdown how each component works and then we’ll upgrade it. Join us in our journey to build cool cars, learn about them, and drive the crap out of them!

Some of our best videos ever are coming out soon, stay tuned so you won't miss a thing!

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: Skip & Shannon react to Luka Doncic's 'lucky' game-winning shot against Grizzlies | NBA | UNDISPUTED
snippet.description:
Even during an eventful night of impressive NBA performances, Luka Doncic still stole the show. With one point eight seconds left and the Dallas Mavericks down two to the Memphis Grizzlies, Luka received the inbounds pass before splitting a double team, stumbling and somehow getting the shot off and draining it. After the game, Luka was pretty honest saying he was surprised when it went in considering he didn’t see the rim when he released it, and he called it quote, 'kinda lucky.' Hear what Skip Bayless and Shannon Sharpe have to say about Luka's lucky shot.

localized.title: Skip & Shannon react to Luka Doncic's 'lucky' game-winning shot against Grizzlies | NBA | UNDISPUTED
localized.description:
Even during an eventful night of impressive NBA performances, Luka Doncic still stole the show. With one point eight seconds left and the Dallas Mavericks down two to the Memphis Grizzlies, Luka received the inbounds pass before splitting a double team, stumbling and somehow getting the shot off and draining it. After the game, Luka was pretty honest saying he was surprised when it went in considering he didn’t see the rim when he released it, and he called it quote, 'kinda lucky.' Hear what Skip Bayless and Shannon Sharpe have to say about Luka's lucky shot.

#Undisputed #NBA #LukaDoncic #DallasMavericks #MemphisGrizzlies

snippet.title: How Russell seriously upset Mercedes in huge Bottas F1 crash
snippet.description:
When the F1 stewards declared the massive accident between George Russell and Valtteri Bottas at Imola a racing incident, that could have been the end of it. But both drivers didn’t want to leave it there, and Mercedes boss Toto Wolff even voiced his displeasure. Against a backdrop of Mercedes’ uncertain 2022 driver line-up plans - which will affect both Bottas and Russell next year - Scott Mitchell explains all the key details of what happened during the crash and why the post-race fallout was so acrimonious

#F1 #Russell #Bottas #Mercedes

READ MORE HERE
https://the-race.com/formula-1/wolffs-stern-disapproval-of-russell-beyond-clio-cup-joke/

snippet.title: Binging with Babish: Space Cake from High Maintenance
snippet.description:
Music: "GOMO" by Broke for Free - he's got a new track out today!
https://youtu.be/XCwa01wCCMY

This week, we're treading dangerously close to controversial territory as, for the first time, Binging falls on an open-secret holiday. To mark the occasion, I'm drawing inspiration from one of my favorite shows, High Maintenance: a loving, humanist, stunningly accurate portrait of the unique brand of weird found in Brooklyn. Whether you 'partake' or not, I hope you'll join me in celebrating by aspiring to be more like The Guy: unflappably chill, constantly curious, and bursting with love for all kindred spirits.

Recipe: https://www.bingingwithbabish.com/recipes/space-cake-high-maintenance

https://youtu.be/XCwa01wCCMY

This week, we're treading dangerously close to controversial territory as, for the first time, Binging falls on an open-secret holiday. To mark the occasion, I'm drawing inspiration from one of my favorite shows, High Maintenance: a loving, humanist, stunningly accurate portrait of the unique brand of weird found in Brooklyn. Whether you 'partake' or not, I hope you'll join me in celebrating by aspiring to be more like The Guy: unflappably chill, constantly curious, and bursting with love for all kindred spirits.

Recipe: https://www.bingingwithbabish.com/recipes/space-cake-high-maintenance

My playlist of preferred cooking tunes, Bangers with Babish!

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare: 
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell05211

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesclimatenuclear/

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years – but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

snippet.title: Manchester United executive vice-chairman Ed Woodward to step down
snippet.description:
► Subscribe to Sky Sports News: http://bit.ly/SkySportsNewsSub

Manchester United executive vice-chairman Ed Woodward is to step down from his role.

However, it is understood that he will continue in his role at the club until the end of 2021.

Woodward had already agreed with the Glazers, United's owners, that he would finish at Old Trafford at the end of the year, but the announcement has been brought forward to Tuesday evening.

#SkySportsNews #SkySports #EuropeanSuperLeague

snippet.title: Farma Vuković ima ovna s najvećim rogovima
snippet.description:
Pridružite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join
Farma Vuković iz Potkraja kod Travnika slovi za jednu od najvećih i najsuvremenijih u kantonu Središnja Bosna. Kontinuirano ulažu u genetski razvoj stada, suvremene strojeve koji olakšavaju rad na farmi te obradu zapuštenih njiva i livada. Vlasnik Drago Vuković izgradio je poslovnu filozofiju koja se temelji na domaćim resursima. Više od 90 posto hrane za svoj stočni fond Drago proizvodi sa domaćih njiva koje su nekada bile zapuštene i zarasle u korov. Danas sa iste zemlje ubire žitarice, djetelinu i sijeno vrhunske kvalitete. Više pogledajte u prilogu.

snippet.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXy​
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0E​
*make sure to tag me on instagram if you paint your own!!!

*LAST CHANCE for the Rubik's Cube pre-order. Don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

INSTAGRAM: 
https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

TIKTOK:
https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

SNAPCHAT:
MoriahOfficial

VISIT ME WEBSITE:
https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs

snippet.description:
Për'Puthen është një talk show dashurie, i cili sjell histori të vërteta dhe të gjalla të njohjeve mes të rinjve . Ashtu sikundër ato ndodhin në jetën reale, pa filtra. Aty paraqitet zhvillimi i njohjeve të reja mes protagonistëve, por trajtohen edhe fenomene që ndodhin çdo ditë në shoqërinë tonë, përtej shkëlqimit të televizionit.

snippet.title: URGENT BITCOIN WARNING!!! 4 WORST Reasons BTC DUMPED
snippet.description:
BTC has just plummeted and everyone is looking for the reason why Bitcoin crashed. The entire crypto market was thrown into a frenzy with many of the top coins seeing 10-20% losses. A lot of people got REKT and billions of dollars worth of liquidations occurred. I’m happy to say I was not one of them.

Today we look at several reasons why Bitcoin dumped. We’ll discuss a possible Coinbase conspiracy to get cheaper BTC. Find out the EXACT reasons for Bitcoin crashing and what I think will happen to the price of Bitcoin in the near future.

snippet.title: Introducing AirTag | Couch | Apple
snippet.description:
AirTag. Keep track of your keys, wallet, luggage, backpack, and more, all in the Find My app. Play a sound on the built-in speaker, or say “Hey Siri, find my gym bag.” With select iPhone models, Precision Finding can lead you right to your nearby AirTag. If it’s farther away, hundreds of millions of Apple devices in the Find My network can help track it down. All anonymously and encrypted for privacy. Because we’re all human, and we’re a lot better at losing things than we are at finding them.

Learn more: http://apple.com/AirTag

'Aquarium (Improvisation after Le Carnaval des animaux by Camille Saint-Saëns)' - Thomas Enhco, Vassilena Serafimova & Camille Saint-Saëns http://apple.co/Aquarium

#AppleEvent #SpringLoaded #AirTag

Welcome to the official Apple YouTube channel. Here you’ll find news about product launches, tutorials, and other great content. Apple’s more than 160,000 employees are dedicated to making the best products on earth, and to leaving the world better than we found it.

snippet.title: GAME RECAP: Mavericks 127, Pistons 117
snippet.description: Led by Luka Doncic’s 30 points, 10 rebounds and 9 assists, the Mavericks defeated the Pistons, 127-117. Jalen Brunson added 20 points (8-12 FG) and 5 assists for the Mavericks in the victory, while Jerami Grant tallied a team-high 26 points for the Pistons in the losing effort. The Mavericks improve to 31-26 on the season, while the Pistons fall to 18-41.

snippet.title: Building Thumb Bucket Ep 2 (Berms, rollers, and singletrack!)
snippet.description:
Thumb bucket is Berm Peak's first machine cut mountain bike trail, which when finished will be a blank canvas for crazy features. This series documents us building the trail from bottom to top, from learning how to use a machine, to drainage, to technical difficulties.

Check out Squatch's YouTube Channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFpcbXL6wsGrQhUDQgvOGCQ

Check out Joe's YouTube Channel 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCccgqHpyg6ax6dLzBx9yZGA

Berm Peak Hoodies, Beanies, Jerseys, Shirts
https://cognativemtb.com/collections/seths-bike-hacks-collection

Check out our second channel for "express" videos https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOpP5PqrzODWpFU961acUbg

Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sethsbikehacks
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/sethsbikehacks

Music in this video is from 
http://share.epidemicsound.com/trQSg
and https://soundstripe.com?fpr=seth20

Support Berm Park! The free public bike park that YOU can ride! Join my Patreon and 100% of the proceeds go towards funding this. Construction is underway right now! 
Learn more here https://www.patreon.com/sethsbikehacks
Video explaining Berm Parkhttps://youtu.be/lZLE6zB-uuI

Advertising disclosure: All of these videos contain products, logos, or mentions associated with Diamondback Bicycles. Whether or not the video itself was sponsored by Diamondback, they do support this channel, and by extension, every video on it.

snippet.title: CHICKEN GIRLS | Season 8 | Ep. 5: “Campaign Speeches”
snippet.description:
The election heats up after Claire’s disastrous campaign speeches leaves Eggie in the lead. Harmony makes a hard choice to save her relationship.

ABOUT CHICKEN GIRLS
With Rhyme and her friends all grown up, Harmony has found her own squad of Chicken Girls. But with all their new interests, secrets and crushes, can this girl group survive middle school? Created by Janey Feingold.

ABOUT BRAT TV 
Brat TV makes original shows with all of your favorite creators! Tune in every day at 3pm for full episodes of “Chicken Girls,” “Total Eclipse,” “Crown Lake,” “Zoe Valentine” and more.

snippet.title: Takimi i fundit i Mevlanit në program?!Vendimi që po mendon të marri ai dhe Ledjana-Përputhen20Prill
snippet.description:
Për'Puthen është një talk show dashurie, i cili sjell histori të vërteta dhe të gjalla të njohjeve mes të rinjve . Ashtu sikundër ato ndodhin në jetën reale, pa filtra. Aty paraqitet zhvillimi i njohjeve të reja mes protagonistëve, por trajtohen edhe fenomene që ndodhin çdo ditë në shoqërinë tonë, përtej shkëlqimit të televizionit. 

Autore: Olsa Muhameti
Moderatore: Bora Zemani
Opinionist: Arjan Konomi

snippet.title: Film Theory: Did Disney STEAL Finding Nemo?
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH   

Disney is infamous for keeping a tight hold on it's copyright, including taking it to extremes with things that TECHNICALLY fall under public domain in their original format. Well, that is not what happened with Finding Nemo. You see, the story of Finding Nemo is VERY similar to a not as well known children's story. One that is NOT in the public domain. Today, Theorists, we are going to dive deep and figure out if Disney actually STOLE the story of Finding Nemo!

Get yourself some Theory Wear! ► https://bit.ly/3bZzn9t
Don't miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH  

#FindingNemo #Pixar #Disney #Disney+ #DisneyTheory #PixarTheory #Theory #FilmTheory #Matpat

snippet.title: New VW Golf R vs AMG A45 - DRAG RACE *The Truth!*
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Subscribe to @volkswizard!

How’s this for a hot hatch showdown - new Volkswagen Golf R vs Mercedes-AMG A45 S! 

On the face of it, these two cars have a lot of similarities. They’re both hot hatches (obviously), they both have AWD, and they’re both powered by 2-litre turbocharged petrol engines. 

However, that’s just about where the similarities end! Starting with the Golf R, it can produce 320hp & 420Nm, while it weighs in at 1,551kg. As for the A45 S, well that can produce 421hp & 500Nm, but it also weighs more than the Golf R, tipping the scales at 1,660kg. 

However, there’s one key difference between these hot hatches - the price! While the Golf R costs just over £39,000, the A45 S rolls up with a price tag of over £57,000!! 

So is it worth it? You’ll have to keep watching to find out!

localized.title: New VW Golf R vs AMG A45 - DRAG RACE *The Truth!*
localized.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Subscribe to @volkswizard!

How’s this for a hot hatch showdown - new Volkswagen Golf R vs Mercedes-AMG A45 S! 

On the face of it, these two cars have a lot of similarities. They’re both hot hatches (obviously), they both have AWD, and they’re both powered by 2-litre turbocharged petrol engines. 

However, that’s just about where the similarities end! Starting with the Golf R, it can produce 320hp & 420Nm, while it weighs in at 1,551kg. As for the A45 S, well that can produce 421hp & 500Nm, but it also weighs more than the Golf R, tipping the scales at 1,660kg. 

However, there’s one key difference between these hot hatches - the price! While the Golf R costs just over £39,000, the A45 S rolls up with a price tag of over £57,000!! 

So is it worth it? You’ll have to keep watching to find out!

snippet.title: Sen Çal Kapımı 38. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Eda ve Serkan havaalanında karşılaşırlar ama hiç umulmadık bir şekilde... Serkan’ın rahatsızlığı Eda’yı derinden etkilemiştir ve zor bir karar vermek zorundadır. Diğer taraftan Selin vazgeçmemeye kararlıdır. Yaşadığı rahatsızlık ve sonrasında gelişen olaylar Serkan’ı hayatıyla ilgili radikal kararlar almaya iter. Serkan’ın yeni kararları herkesi şaşkına çevirmiştir. Eda ve Serkan aşklarına yeni bir başlangıç yapmak için aradıkları fırsatı bulabilecekler mi?

snippet.title: CHICKEN GIRLS | Season 8 | Ep. 4: “Wacky Wednesday”
snippet.description:
When Bel is embarrassed by Power Surge, she finds an unlikely ally in Leo. Meanwhile, Harmony and Jordan’s relationship is tested when Harmony joins the drama club.

ABOUT CHICKEN GIRLS
With Rhyme and her friends all grown up, Harmony has found her own squad of Chicken Girls. But with all their new interests, secrets and crushes, can this girl group survive middle school? Created by Janey Feingold.

snippet.title: Queen arrives at chapel for Prince Philip's funeral service
snippet.description:
The Queen arrives at St George's Chapel, where she is greeted by the Dean of Windsor, the Right Reverend David Conner.

Prince Philip's coffin is followed by senior royals, including the Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, and Princes William and Harry.

snippet.title: Emanet 160. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 160 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#shorts

snippet.title: Sen Çal Kapımı 39. Bölüm (Sezon Finali)
snippet.description:
Eda ve Serkan yaşadıkları tehlikeye rağmen dilek kutusunda şanslarını denemeye devam ederler. Serkan hastalığından bahsetmeden hayatın tadını çıkartmak isterken kimse ondaki bu değişikliğe bir anlam verememektedir.
Serkan ve Eda sarı karavanlarında farklı bir yaşam tarzı deneyimlerler. Serkan’ın bu beklenmedik kararları Eda’nın da aklını karıştırmaktadır. Hayallerindeki karavanda sevdiği adamla hayatı dolu dolu yaşarken onları bekleyen tehlikenin farkında değildir. Başlarına gelen son olay Serkan’ın sırrının ortaya çıkmasına neden olacak mıdır?

Sen Çal Kapımı Ailesine Katılmak için: https://bit.ly/3jB1Rsj﻿
Sen Çal Kapımı Resmi Youtube Kanalı: https://bit.ly/3dxNPVW

Dizi, oyuncu kadrosunda; Kerem Bürsin ve Hande Erçel’in yanı sıra Neslihan Yeldan, Evrim Doğan, Anıl İlter, Melisa Döngel, Çağrı Çıtanak, Elçin Afacan, Başak Gümülcinelioğlu, Alican Aytekin, Sarp Bozkurt ve Sinan Albayrak gibi birbirinden başarılı isimleri barındıyor.


#yenidenbuluşacağız #KeremBürsin #HandeErçel

snippet.title: What Color Is My Hoodie?
snippet.description:
Grey? Blue? Purple? It can look different, depending on the context. Let's talk about color perception, color temperature, and the history of laundry.

Atmospheric opacity image from ESA/Hubble (F. Granato): https://www.eso.org/public/images/atm_opacity/ - image licensed under CC by 4.0 - https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

The optical illusion is original, but based on the work of David Novick: https://twitter.com/novickprof/status/1139342022551191553

More on Illuminant D65: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Illuminant_D65 - the references in this article go into the full technical detail

snippet.title: Luka Doncic Is FRUSTRATED! This Is Why
snippet.description:
The NBA is buzzing right now over this unbelievable one handed floater from downtown for the win at the buzzer.
However even with this miraculous win, the Mavs are still in the play in zone. And the format itself is actually completely changed for this year.
And Luka Doncic is not happy about it at all. Let me explain. What up everybody my name is Stefan and this is Heat Check. Let’s get into it.
Going over the tournament changes first, last year the 8 and 9 seed which were the Blazers and the Grizzlies were within 4 games of each other so they faced off before the playoffs.
Portland as the better seeded team had the advantage of needing just 1 win, while Memphis needed 2 in a row. Dame and CJ sealed the deal in the first game and got in the playoffs.
This season tho, the teams that are 7 through 10 will have a play in regardless of if they’re more or less than 4 games in the standings.
Also, contrary to popular belief, the games will not be played like this. 7 vs 10 and 8 vs 9. 
Not at all. The NBA made this super complicated so let me give you a practical example as if the play-in started today.
Actually the format is such that 7 plays 8 and 9 plays 10 in a single elimination game. 
The winner of the higher seeded matchup will go straight to the playoffs as number 7.
The loser however will get a second chance as an award for their better record than the bottom 2 squads.
And speaking of them 9 and 10 will battle and the team that fails in this game is eliminated and goes home, while the winner plays another deciding game against the team that lost in that higher seeded matchup. And then finally the better team gets the last place in the playoffs.
I promise you’re not getting a better explanation anywhere online, so if you’re still confused, blame the NBA and just re-watch this video. Ok let’s now get to Luka.
Recently in a postgame interview Doncic voiced his frustration and disagreement with how the format is set up.
Mark Cuban was quick to support his star player and this point of view with his own remarks calling the tournament an enormous mistake and saying that it doubles the stress that players and teams are already feeling because of the compressed schedule.
Now look, on 1 side it’s great for both us the fans, that we get to see some extra drama even before the playoffs. That Portland vs Memphis game last year was crazy. 
Also, it gives bottom teams something to play for instead of resorting to tanking in the second half of the season. Look at this. In the east the 13 place Cleveland are just 2 games out of it right now. They have a lot to fight for.
But on the other hand, I do understand Luka and you can’t give a 10 seed that big of a chance to where they could suck for the entire season, but then win 2 in a row and go straight to the playoffs. 
Anyway, it’s clear that these are just measurements that are implemented to combat the shortened schedule and everything else that happened in this unprecedented situation.
I’m sure that when all this settles and we have a full and normal season, the league would be able to find a sustainable solution that’s gonna be fair for all teams that are in playoff contention.
Until then, you’ll have to live with my explanation of the format. That’s it for now, subscribe and talk to you in the next one. Peace out.

snippet.title: rebirthing : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I’ve had a lot of lives – like my cat, I’m on my ninth life.” 
Demi Lovato’s explosive documentary series comes to a close with revelations about her broken engagement, her return to the studio, and exploration of moderation sobriety as she attempts to let go of her past and moves ahead living her truth. 

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Love is more than just the way you feel. Text loveis to 22522 for support and help understanding healthy relationships.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Text: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

 
Find resources for your path to recovery at the Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

de.title: Wiedergeburt : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
"Ich hatte viele Leben, wie meine Katze. Das ist mein neuntes."
Demi Lovatos explosive Dokuserie endet mit Enthüllungen über ihre gelöste Verlobung, ihre Rückkehr ins Studio und das Konzept des maßvollen Konsums, während sie versucht, ihre Vergangenheit ruhen zu lassen und ihre Wahrheit zu leben.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle der National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (auch Click-to-Chat-Nachrichten)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Liebe ist Respekt. Liebe ist mehr als das Gefühl. SMS mit loveis an 22522 zur Unterstützung von gesunden Beziehungen.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
SMS: loveis to 22522
Online-Chat: www.loveisrespect.org

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

Lernen Sie, Leben zu retten, auf endoverdose.net.

Finden Sie Hilfsangebote für Ihren Weg in die Genesung bei Recovery Resource Hub
(https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

ko.title: 환생 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
"저는 제 고양이처럼 목숨이 아홉 개예요. 아홉 번째 인생을 살고 있죠"
데미 로바토의 파혼, 녹음실 복귀 이야기와 음주와 약물의 적정량 사용을 통해 과거를 놓고 진실한 삶을 살려는 시도를 공개하며 폭발적인 다큐멘터리 시리즈는 막을 내린다.

도움받을 곳:

전국 섭식 장애 협회 (NEDA) 헬프라인
1-800-931-2237 (채팅/메시징 서비스 제공)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 

사랑은 존중입니다. 사랑은 감정 그 이상입니다. 22522로 loveis를 보내시면 도움과 함께 건강한 관계에 관해 배울 수 있습니다.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
문자: 22522로 loveis를 보내세요
온라인 상담: www.loveisrespect.org

즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

endoverdose.net에서 생명을 구할 수 있는 방법을 알아보세요.

Recovery Resource Hub에서 회복 과정을 위한 자원을 확인하세요.
(https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/)

id.title: Kelahiran Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku mempunyai banyak nyawa – seperti kucingku, aku dalam nyawa kesembilanku sekarang.”
Serial dokumenter eksplosif dari Demi Lovato hamper sampai kepada titik akhir dengan pengungkapan tentang pertunangannya yang kandas, kembalinya ke studio, dan eksplorasi dari kewarasan moderasi ketika dia mencoba untuk melepaskan masa lalunya dan melangkah maju menjalani hidup dengan penuh keceriaan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan) www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Cinta Adalah Respek. Cinta itu lebih besar dari sekadar caramu merasakan. Ketik loveis kirim ke 22522 untuk dukungan dan bantuan memahami hubungan yang sehat.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Ketik: loveis kirim ke 22522
Obrolan Daring: www.loveisrespect.org

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

Temukan sumber-sumber sebagai jalanmu untuk pemulihan di Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

en.title: rebirthing : Dancing with the Devil
en.description:
“I’ve had a lot of lives – like my cat, I’m on my ninth life.” 
Demi Lovato’s explosive documentary series comes to a close with revelations about her broken engagement, her return to the studio, and exploration of moderation sobriety as she attempts to let go of her past and moves ahead living her truth. 

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Love is more than just the way you feel. Text loveis to 22522 for support and help understanding healthy relationships.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Text: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

 
Find resources for your path to recovery at the Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

es-419.title: renacimiento : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"He tenido muchas vidas. Como mi gato, estoy en mi última vida".
La explosiva serie documental de Demi Lovato llega a su fin con revelaciones sobre su compromiso cancelado, su regreso al estudio y la exploración de la sobriedad moderada mientras intenta dejar atrás su pasado y avanzar viviendo su verdad.

Recursos:

Línea de ayuda de la Asociación Nacional de Trastornos Alimentarios (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (también ofrecen chat en línea)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

El amor es respeto. El amor es algo más que lo que se siente. Envía loveis al 22522 para obtener apoyo y ayuda para entender las relaciones saludables.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Texto: loveis al 22522
Chat en línea: www.loveisrespect.org

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

Aprende a salvar vidas en endoverdose.net.

Encuentra recursos para tu camino hacia la recuperación en el Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

pt-BR.title: renascimento : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Eu já tive várias vidas – como meu gato, estou na minha última.”
A explosiva série documental de Demi Lovato termina com revelações sobre o noivado rompido, sua volta ao estúdio e sua exploração da sobriedade moderada enquanto ela tenta se livrar do passado e encontrar sua verdade.

Recursos:

Telefone de atendimento da National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (também existe a chance de bate-papo online) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Amor é muito mais do que um sentimento. Envie loveis para 22522 para ter apoio e aprender a compreender relacionamentos saudáveis.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Envie: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741
 
Aprenda a salvar vidas em endoverdose.net.

Encontre recursos para seu caminho para a recuperação em Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

fr.title: Renaissance : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
"J'ai plusieurs vies, comme un chat. J'en suis à ma neuvième."

Le documentaire explosif de Demi Lovato touche à sa fin avec des révélations sur ses fiançailles rompues, son retour en studio et l'expérimentation d'une thérapie de la modération tandis qu'elle tente de tourner la page sur son passé et de vivre sa vérité. 

Ressources :
 
Plateforme d'écoute de la National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (chat en ligne disponible) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
L'amour est du respect. L'amour va plus loin que les sentiments. Envoyez "loveis" au 22522 pour soutenir et comprendre ce qu'est une relation saine.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
SMS : loveis au 22522
Chat en ligne : www.loveisrespect.org
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
 
Apprenez à sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.
 
Pour vous aider dans votre processus de guérison, rendez-vous sur Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

When I get home
Boy, you better not be there
You're long gone
Shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Just break the cycle in half
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

*The Rubik's Cube pre-order is still ON! But it ends soon, don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

SUPPLIES I USED (contains affiliate links):
Angelus Leather Paint (big bottles): https://amzn.to/2QzjUmG​
Angelus Leather Paint (small bottles): https://amzn.to/2U5gmuo​
Vinyl Red Tape: https://amzn.to/2WHjhLR​
High Gloss Acrylic Finisher: https://amzn.to/2J4mCwc


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

localized.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
localized.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

snippet.title: The National Debt: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (HBO)
snippet.description:
The national debt has long been portrayed as a burden we’re placing on future generations. John Oliver discusses how national debt works, why people are so concerned about it, and why it might be more helpful that you think. 

Connect with Last Week Tonight online... 

Subscribe to the Last Week Tonight YouTube channel for more almost news as it almost happens: www.youtube.com/lastweektonight 

Find Last Week Tonight on Facebook like your mom would: www.facebook.com/lastweektonight 

Follow us on Twitter for news about jokes and jokes about news: www.twitter.com/lastweektonight 

Visit our official site for all that other stuff at once: www.hbo.com/lastweektonight
